headline: Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks Q1 Results: Benchmarking Progressive (NYSE:PGR)
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Progressive (NYSE:PGR) and the best and worst performers in the property & casualty insurance industry.
